name: G-13 eslint compliance: docs_url must use the https:// scheme per E-8; http:// is rejected
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-eslint-compliance.sh" "$PWD/file.yaml" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'docs_url must use https://' err.txt && echo https_only 1>&2
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
rules:
  - {id: g-x-001, name: x, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: http://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: []}
' > file.yaml
